pr.title: Record: 0.6364 BPB - Depth Recurrence + Multi-Order N-gram Backoff

output.summary: Depth recurrence reuses layers 4/5 for virtual depth while eval-time multi-order n-gram backoff with entropy-adaptive blending plus multi-GPU prefill refines scoring.
techniques: Depth recurrence repeating layers 4/5 for 13 virtual layers
Eval-time multi-order n-gram backoff (orders 2-7) with entropy-adaptive alpha
Multi-GPU n-gram prefill to avoid hash-table fragmentation
